channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-02-26 09:41 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: China added more solar capacity in 2025 than America has installed in its entire history. That's the...
item.description: China added more solar capacity in 2025 than America has installed in its entire history. That's the most important energy chart you'll see today. And 2025 was also the first year when small-scale distributed solar pulled in more investments than utility-scale solar farms globally. Considering that the U.S. has hundreds of GW stuck waiting for grid connections, the conditions are aligned to start putting solar + storage on every American home. My research team put together a Deep Dive on solar, if you want the full breakdown. Here’s the link:chamath.substack.com/p/solar…

item.title: @elonmusk: Another brilliant Community Note for Reform UK
item.description: Another brilliant Community Note for Reform UK

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX is bringing Dragon home Thursday, February 26 After 185 days docked to the ISS, the CRS-33 sp...
item.description: SpaceX is bringing Dragon home Thursday, February 26 After 185 days docked to the ISS, the CRS-33 spacecraft will undock at 12:05 PM EST, with a splashdown off the California coast expected just before midnight It’s carrying over 4,000 lbs of wild cargo: frozen stem cells for ALS and Parkinson's research, materials 3D-printed in zero gravity, and Bioprinted liver tissue & blood vessels for organ transplants These breakthroughs could completely revolutionize healthcare on Earth and tech for upcoming missions

item.title: @elonmusk: This is classic failure theater from Thune. He doesn’t want to do the work of forcing Democrats to m...
item.description: This is classic failure theater from Thune. He doesn’t want to do the work of forcing Democrats to maintain a real filibuster, so he’s just going to file cloture on their zombie filibuster, which will fail. Then he can immediately move on to what he really cares about: passing corporate welfare for K Street. Failure theater from do-nothing Republicans should be mocked and condemned, not praised.

item.title: @elonmusk: Chuck Schumer is asked what kind of “immigration deal” he’d like to pursue in the Senate. The main f...
item.description: Chuck Schumer is asked what kind of “immigration deal” he’d like to pursue in the Senate. The main feature: “A path to citizenship for 11 million people who are here." Once in a while, he says it out loud.

item.title: @elonmusk: And this number is greatly underreported. Actual numbers are much worse.
item.description: And this number is greatly underreported. Actual numbers are much worse.

item.title: @elonmusk: Great news! Now it is time to enforce the talking filibuster. The filibuster rule is meant to allow ...
item.description: Great news! Now it is time to enforce the talking filibuster. The filibuster rule is meant to allow senators to present their arguments before a bill is passed. It is NOT intended to require 60 votes to pass anything at all! STOP THE ABUSE OF THE FILIBUSTER NOW. Either senators must talk or they must pass the bill to SAVE AMERICA!
